Optimization
Website optimization
Hero image — performance metrics
Website optimization improves loading speed, Core Web Vitals scores, and overall user experience. Techniques range from image compression and lazy loading to caching strategies and code minification.
Related resources
Google PageSpeed Insights
pagespeed.web.dev
Core Web Vitals explained
web.dev
WebPageTest — advanced performance testing
webpagetest.org
Responsive design
Responsive web design
Hero image — multi-device layout
Responsive web design uses flexible grids, fluid images, and CSS media queries to make layouts adapt across any screen size. CSS Grid and Flexbox are the primary layout tools; a mobile-first approach ensures the base experience is solid before scaling up.
Related resources
CSS Grid — complete guide
css-tricks.com
Flexbox Froggy — interactive Flexbox tutorial
flexboxfroggy.com
Every Layout — intrinsic CSS patterns
every-layout.dev
About
About this hub
Hero image — about photo
This resource hub was built as a capstone project for CMST 387 — Principles of Web Design and Technology III. It collects and organizes the most useful resources from the course into one accessible, mobile-first site.
Site info
Accessibility statement
This site targets WCAG 2.2 Level AA
Built with HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS
No frameworks or build tools

Get in touch
Have a question, suggestion, or found a broken link? Send a message.
